title: Allow the "Connect Boards" automation  to see existing connect column

posts.author: CHOCM (Christopher Herndon)
posts.cookedHtml:
A feature that allows the “Create item in board and connect board” automation to connect to an existing connect column.

Currently when i try to link multiple boards to the same connect column with automation, it doesn’t let me pick an existing column. I was directed here to request this by Monday support.
